PEP, -0.02% fell 0.5% in premarket trading Monday, after the beverage and snack giant said Chief Financial Officer Hugh Johnston will leave at the end of the month after about 13 years in the role and 34 years with the company, to become Walt Disney Co.'s DIS, +2.14% CFO.
